meaning: adj.平的,平滑的,偶数的,一致的,平静的,恰好的,平均的,连贯的adv.[加强语气]甚至(...也),连...都,即使,恰好,正当vt.使平坦,使相等vi.变平,相等n.偶数,偶校验
examples: She can't even change a nappy.
Web sites can bring customers and credibility, even to young entrepreneurs like the Steeds.
The broad message is the same, even if it is a slightly larger contraction than expected.
